v1: All I once held dear built my life upon
All this world reveres and wars to own
All I once thought gain I have counted loss
Spent and worthless now compared to this
c: Knowing You, Jesus, knowing You
There is no greater thing
You’re my all, You’re the best
You’re my joy, my righteousness
And I love You, Lord.
v2: Now my heart’s desire is to know You more
To be found by You and known as Yours
To possess by faith what I could not earn
All surpassing gift of righteousness
v3: Oh, to know the pow’r of Your risen life
And to know You in Your sufferings
To become like You in Your death my Lord
So with You to live and never die.

v1: All that I am, all that I have,
I lay them down before You, O Lord.
All my regrets, all my acclaim,
The joy and the pain, I'm making them Yours.
c: Lord, I offer my life to You,
Everything I've been through,
Use it for Your glory.
Lord, I offer my days to You,
Lifting my praise to You as a pleasing sacrifice,
Lord, I offer You my life.
v2: Things in the past, things yet unseen,
Wishes and dreams that are yet to come true.
All of my hopes, all of my plans,
My heart and my hands are lifted to You.

v1: All who are thirsty
All who are weak
Come to the fountain
Dip your heart in the stream of life
Let the pain and the sorrow
Be washed away
In the waves of His mercy
As deep cries out to deep
c: “We sing . . .”
Come Lord Jesus come
Come Lord Jesus come (2x)
b: Won't You come
Won't You come
Nothing but Your will for me
I am only free when You come

v1: An earthen vessel I was made
In me a treasure has been laid
In order that the glory would be of You.
In troubled times my soul resists
Until I find that gold exists
And finding this I sing my “Hallelujahs”
c: Hallelujah, Hallelujah
Hallelujah, Hallelujah
v2: My vessel is a fragile thing,
Seemed every day brought suffering
Until a part of me felt to refuse You.
I walled You out and turned away
And I resolved to never pray
But then I heard You whisper, “Hallelujah”
v3: Of all the tears I’ve ever cried
None were so dear as those that pried
Away the walls I built up to refuse You.
I turned to You and Your embrace
As I beheld Your lovely face
Still echoed in my heart Your “Hallelujah”
v4: How could it be, You were so kind
To make me weak, so I would find
The glory of the face of Jesus through You?
I will be made eternally
To match this gold inside of me,
And this is why I sing my “Hallelujahs”

c: O Christ be the center of our lives
Be the place we fix our eyes
Be the center of our lives
v1: And You're the center of the universe
Everything was made in You Jesus
Breath of every living thing
Everyone was made for You
You hold everything together
You hold everything together
v2: We lift our eyes to heaven
And we wrap our lives around Your life
We lift our eyes to heaven to You (2x)

v1: As morning dawns and evening fades
You inspire songs of praise
That rise from earth to touch Your heart
And glorify Your Name
c: Your Name is a strong and mighty tower
Your Name is a shelter like no other
Your Name let the nations sing it louder
'Cause nothing has the power to save
But Your Name
v2: Jesus in Your Name we pray
Come and fill our hearts today
Lord give us strength to live for You
And glorify Your Name

v1: As the deer panteth for the water
So my soul longeth after You.
You alone are my heart’s desire
And I long to worship You.
c: You alone are my strength, my shield
To You alone may my spirit yield
You alone are my heart’s desire
And I long to worship You
v2: You’re my friend and You are my brother
Even though You are a King.
I want You more than any other,
So much more than anything.

v1: Be still, there is a Healer
His love is deeper than the sea
His mercy is unfailing
His arms, a fortress for the weak
p: Let faith arise, let faith arise
c: I lift my hands to believe again
You are my refuge, You are my strength
As I pour out my heart, these things I remember
You are faithful, God, forever
v2: Be still, there is a river
That flows from Calvary’s tree
A fountain for the thirsty
Your grace that washes over me
b: Let faith arise, let faith arise
Open my eyes, open my eyes
Let faith arise, let faith arise
Open my eyes, open my eyes

v1: Be Thou my vision, O Lord of my heart
Naught be all else to me, save that Thou art
Thou my best thought by day or by night
Waking or sleeping Thy presence my light
v2: Be Thou my wisdom and Thou my true Word
I ever with Thee and Thou with me Lord
Thou my great Father, I Thy true son
Thou in me dwelling and I with Thee one
v3: Be Thou my shield and my sword for the fight
Be Thou my dignity be Thou my might
Thou my soul's shelter and Thou my high tow'r
Raise Thou me heav'nward, O Pow'r of my pow'r
v4: Riches I heed not nor man's empty praise
Thou mine inheritance now and always
Thou and Thou only be first in my heart
High King of heaven my treasure Thou art
v5: High King of heaven when vict'ry is won
May I reach heaven's joys, O bright heaven's Sun
Heart of my own heart, whatever befall
Still be my vision, O Ruler of all

v1: Before the day before the light
Before the world revolved around the sun
God on high stepped down into time
And wrote the story of His love for everyone
p: He has filled our hearts with wonder
So that we always remember
c: You and I are made to worship
You and I are called to love
You and I are forgiven and free
When you and I embrace surrender
When you and I choose to believe
Then you and I will see
Who we were meant to be
v2: All we are and all we have
Is all a gift from God that we receive
Brought to life we open up our eyes
To see the majesty and glory of the King
b: Even the rocks cry out
Even the heavens shout
At the sound of His holy name
So let ev'ry voice sing out
Let ev'ry knee bow down
He's worthy of all our praise

Songs For Our Generation.title: Before the Throne of God Above

v1: Before the throne of God above
I have a strong, a perfect plea:
A great High Priest, whose name is Love
Who ever lives and pleads for me
My name is graven on His hands
My name is written on His heart
I know that while in heaven He stands
No tongue can bid me thence depart
No tongue can bid me thence depart
v2: When Satan tempts me to despair
And tells me of the guilt within
Upward I look, and see Him there
Who made an end of all my sin
Because the sinless Savior died
My sinful soul is counted free
For God, the Just, is satisfied
To look on Him and pardon me
c: Hallelujah! Hallelujah! Praise the One, Risen Son of God!
v3: Behold Him there, the risen Lamb
My perfect, spotless righteousness
The great unchangeable I AM
The King of glory and of grace!
One in Himself, I cannot die
My soul is purchased by His blood
My life is hid with Christ on high
With Christ, my Savior and my God

v1: Before the world was made
Before you spoke it to be
You were the King of Kings
Yeah You were, yeah You were
And now You’re reigning still
Enthroned above all things
Angels and saints cry out
We join them as we sing
c: Glory to God
Glory to God
Glory to God forever            (repeat)
v2: Creator God you gave
Me breath so I could praise
Your great and matchless name
All my days, all my days
So let my whole life be
A blazing offering
A life that shouts and sings
The greatness of our King
b: Take my life and let it be
All for You and for Your glory
Take my life and let it be Yours

v1: Blessed assurance, Jesus is mine;
Oh, what a foretaste of glory divine!
Heir of salvation, purchase of God,
Born of His Spirit, washed in His blood.
c: This is my story, this is my song,
Praising my Savior all the day long.
This is my story, this is my song,
Praising my Savior all the day long.
v2: Perfect submission, perfect delight,
Visions of rapture now burst on my sight;
Angels descending, bring from above
Echoes of mercy, whispers of love.
v3: Perfect submission, all is at rest,
I, in my Savior, am happy and blest;
Watching and waiting, looking above,
Filled with His goodness, lost in His love

v1: Blessed be Your name in the land that is plentiful
Where Your streams of abundance flow
Blessed be Your name
Blessed be Your name when I'm found in the desert place
Though I walk through the wilderness
Blessed be Your name
p: Every blessing You pour out I'll turn back to praise
When the darkness closes in Lord still I will say:
c: Blessed be the name of the Lord
Blessed be Your name (Jesus!)
Blessed be the name of the Lord
Blessed be Your glorious name
v2: Blessed be Your name when the sun's shining down on me
When the world's all as it should be
Blessed be Your name
Blessed be Your name on the road marked with suffering
Though there's pain in the offering
Blessed be Your name
b: You give and take away
You give and take away
My heart will choose to say
Lord, blessed be Your name

Songs For Our Generation.title: Christ Has Come to Be Life

v1: Christ has come to be life
The Processed, Divine Trinity
God the Father’s the Source
A Fountain emerging to be—
God the Son as a gushing up spring
And the Spirit
A river for life imparting
O how can this be, a great mystery
The Triune God flowing in me?
c: O I’ve got rivers of life
Flowing out of my innermost being!
I’ve got rivers of life
Flowing out of my innermost being!
v2: So I’ve no cause to frown,
As one who received the zoe
I know life runs its course
And triumphs inevitably
I’m required just to stay in the flow
If I do the drinking, then God gives the growth!
So there’s joy in my heart, and a spring in my step
And a smile on my face as I sing—
v3: Yet this life, though it frees
Is not meant for mere victory
God is full of intent
And never could flow aimlessly
So this life moves and grows within me
From my spirit within to my soul and body
Now His life is expressed, to the world manifest
Gushing up unto eternity!

Songs For Our Generation.title: Come, Now is the Time to Worship

v1: Come, now is the time to worship
Come, now is the time to give your heart
Come, just as you are to worship
Come, just as you are before your God, come
c: One day every tongue will confess You are God
One day every knee will bow
Still the greatest treasure remains for those
Who gladly choose You now

v1: Come and rejoice with me, come and rejoice.
Lift up your voice now and come and rejoice.
In my distress I called out to the Lord.
He answered me and delivered my soul.
From lying lips and from a tongue of deceit I’m free!
Can I enough rejoice?
So come, come rejoice! Rejoice with me!
v2: Come and rejoice with me, come and rejoice,
Lift up your voice with me and come and rejoice.
No more a sojourner in vanity.
No more a wanderer religiously.
We’ve been brought back to Christ and His economy.
Can we enough rejoice?
So come, come rejoice! Rejoice with me!
b: Let us go up unto the house of the Lord our God
And let us give thanks to His Name.
Our feet are now within Your gates, O Jerusalem,
We’re standing, we’re thanking,
We’re praying, we’re praising,
Yes! Praise Ye the Lord!
Praise Ye the Lord!
v3: Come and rejoice with me, come and rejoice.
Lift up your voice now and come and rejoice.
Our eyes are lifted up unto the hills.
The Lord, our Keeper, for all that He wills.
No one can snatch us out, from now to eternity.
Can we enough rejoice? So come!
Come rejoice! Rejoice with me!

Songs For Our Generation.title: Come Thou Fount of Ev’ry Blessing

v1: Come, Thou Fount of ev’ry blessing,
Tune my heart to sing Thy grace;
Streams of mercy, never ceasing,
Call for songs of loudest praise.
Jesus sought me when a stranger,
Wand’ring from the face of God;
He, to save my soul from danger,
Interposed His precious blood.
v2: O to grace how great a debtor
Daily I’m constrained to be!
Let that grace, Lord, like a fetter,
Bind my wand’ring heart to Thee.
Teach me, Lord, some rapturous measure,
Meet for me Thy grace to prove,
While I sing the countless treasure
Of my God’s unchanging love.
v3: Prone to wander, Lord, I feel it;
Prone to leave the God I love:
Take my heart, Oh, take and seal it
With Thy Spirit from above.
Rescued thus from sin and danger,
Purchased by the Savior’s blood,
May I walk on earth a stranger,
As a son and heir of God.

v1: Come like You promised You would
I want to surrender for good
I know that I need You
And I don't want to keep living life alone
c: So take my heart, and make it new
And make it true, and make it like You
Take my hands, I lift them high
They're Yours not mine to do
Do what You will, do what You will, do what You will
v2: I feel like a blind man in Your sight
I know that I'm wicked in Your eyes
So wash me and make me shine like Your Son
I want to tell everyone that You're the only One
b: I'm ready now, I'm ready now, I'm ready now
Do what You will
I'm ready now, I'm ready now, I'm ready now

Songs For Our Generation.title: Did You Feel the Mountains Tremble?
Songs For Our Generation.presentation: v1 v2 p1 c v3 p2

v1: Did you feel the mountains tremble?
Did you hear the oceans roar?
When the people rose to sing of
Jesus Christ the risen One.
v2: Did you feel the people tremble?
Did you hear the singers roar?
When the lost began to sing of
Jesus Christ the saving One.
p1: And we can see that God You're moving.
A mighty river through the nations.
And young and old will turn to Jesus.
Prepare the way of the risen Lord.
c: Open up the doors and let the music play,
Let the streets resound with singing.
Songs that bring Your hope, songs that bring Your joy,
Dancers who dance upon injustice.
v3: Do you feel the darkness tremble,
When all the saints join in one song?
And all the streams flow as one river,
To wash away our brokenness.
p2: And here we see that God You're moving.
A time of jubilee is coming.
When young and old return to Jesus.
Prepare the way of the risen Lord.

v1: Day into night,
You can turn the dark into light,
You can take a soul that was lost,
And turn it around.
v2: Lord, on my own,
My heart can turn as hard as a stone
But You can make it tender again
With Your love.
c: Stir up a hunger,
Stir up a hunger in my heart.
Nothing will satisfy me, nothing else will do.
Stir up a hunger,
A hunger in my heart,
Stir up a hunger in my heart for more of You.

v1: Don’t let my love grow cold
I’m calling out, light the fire again
Don’t let my vision die
I’m calling out, light the fire again
v2: You know my heart, my deeds
I’m calling out, light the fire again
I need Your discipline
I’m calling out, light the fire again
c: I am here to buy gold, refined in the fire
Naked and poor, wretched and blind I come
Clothe me in white…so I won’t be ashamed
Lord, light the fire again.

v1: Drink! A river pure and clean that's flowing
from the Throne;
Eat! The Tree of Life with fruits abundant,
richly grown;
Look! No need of lamp nor sun nor moon
to keep it bright, for
Here there is no night!
c: Do come, oh, do come,
Says Spirit and the Bride:
Do come, oh, do come,
Let him that heareth, cry
Do come, oh, do come,
Let him who thirsts and will
Take freely the water of Life!
v2: Christ, our River, Christ, our Water,
springing from within;
Christ, our Tree, and Christ, the Fruits,
to be enjoyed therein,
Christ, our Day, and Christ, our Light,
and Christ, our Morning Star:
Christ our Everything!
v3: We are washing all our robes
the Tree of Life to eat;
"O Lord, Amen, Hallelujah!"--
Jesus is so sweet!
We our spirits exercise,
and thus experience Christ.
What a Christ have we!
v4: Now we have a home so bright that
outshines the sun,
Where the brothers all unite and
truly are one.
Jesus gets us all together,
Him we now display
In the local church.

v1: Empty hands held high, Such small sacrifice
If not joined with my life, I sing in vain tonight
May the words I say, And the things I do
Make my lifesong sing, Bring a smile to You
c: Let my lifesong sing to You
Let my lifesong sing to You
I wanna sign Your name
To the end of this day
Knowing that my heart was true
Let my lifesong sing to You
v2: Lord I give my life, a living sacrifice
To reach a world in need, to be Your hands and feet
May the words I say, and the things I do
Make my lifesong sing, bring a smile to You
b: Hallelujah, hallelujah, let my lifesong sing to You

v1: Everyone needs compassion, Love that's never failing
Let mercy fall on me, Everyone needs forgiveness
The kindness of a Savior, The hope of nations
c: Savior, He can move the mountains
My God is mighty to save, He is mighty to save
Forever, Author of salvation
He rose and conquered the grave
Jesus conquered the grave
v2: So take me as You find me, All my fears and failures
Fill my life again, I give my life to follow
Everything I believe in, Now I surrender
b: Shine your light, And let the whole world see
We're singing for the glory, Of the risen King Jesus
Shine your light, And let the whole world see
We're singing for the glory, Of the risen King

v1: Even though I walk
Through the valley of the shadow of death
Your perfect love is casting out fear
And even when I'm caught
In the middle of the storms of this life
I won't turn back I know You are near
p: And I will fear no evil
For my God is with me
And if my God is with me
Whom then shall I fear?
Whom then shall I fear?
c: Oh, no, You never let go
Through the calm and through the storm
Oh, no, You never let go
In ev'ry high and ev'ry low
Oh, no, You never let go
Lord You never let go of me
v2: And I can see a light that is coming
For the heart that holds on
A glorious light beyond all compare
And there will be an end to these troubles
But until that day comes
We'll live to know You here on the earth
b: Yes I can see a light
That is coming for the heart that holds on
And there will be an end to these troubles
But until that day comes
Still I will praise You
Still I will praise You

Songs For Our Generation.title: Fallen, That’s the Way We All Begin

v1: Fallen, that’s the way we all begin;
Imprisoned by the evil fate we’re in.
How can we from this hard world of sin be saved?
c: Just by calling Jesus, Jesus, Jesus,
Every moment, each day!
Calling the name of Jesus
We’re finding is the way.
It’s Jesus! Lord Jesus!
v2: Even though we love the Lord so much,
Somehow, it seems we get out of touch
With Jesus. How can we be freed from such distress?
v3: Sometimes we know we aren’t being real.
Then times, we just live by how we feel.
Is there some way we could ever deal with self?
v4: Christians, scattered throughout all the earth
Are wondering, “Lord, where is Your Bride of worth?”
“How can all those of the second birth be one?”

v1: Falling on my knees in worship
Giving all I am to seek Your face
Lord all I am is Yours
v2: My whole life I place in Your hands
God of mercy humbled I bow down
In Your presence at Your throne
c: I called You answered
And You came to my rescue
And I, I wanna be where You are
b: In my life be lifted high
In our world be lifted high
In our love be lifted high

v1: From the highest of heights to the depths of the sea
Creation's revealing Your majesty
From the colors of fall to the fragrance of spring
Every creature unique in the song that it sings
All exclaiming
c: Indescribable, uncontainable,
You placed the stars in the sky and You know them by name.
You are amazing God
All powerful, untameable,
Awestruck we fall to our knees as we humbly proclaim
(You see the depths of my heart and You love me the same)
You are amazing God
v2: Who has told every lightning bolt where it should go
Or seen heavenly storehouses laden with snow
Who imagined the sun and gives source to its light
Yet conceals it to bring us the coolness of night
None can fathom

Songs For Our Generation.title: From the Morning to the Evening

v1: From the morning to the evening,
His faithfulness I see.
His mercy reaching sinners,
Reaching even me,
And I know, now I know…
Brighter than the brightest sunlight,
All doubts and fears just cease;
Sweeter than the sweetest delight,
His living Word in me
And I know, now I know…
c: That God is there for me tomorrow, as He is for me today,
That He’ll take my cares and sorrows and He’ll wipe them all away,
There’s no crisis that He can’t bear, there’s no storm He can’t abate;
He’s my God, He’s my God.
v2: Day by day His grace grows dearer;
His love has conquered me,
Never leaving, never ceasing,
His Spirit constantly
Flooding me, rich and free;
Higher than the highest heaven,
He lifts me up to see
New Jerusalem descending,
His Bride, His love to be;
Eternally, it shall be.

Songs For Our Generation.title: Gathered in Thy Name, Lord Jesus
Songs For Our Generation.presentation: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v6

v1: Gathered in Thy name, Lord Jesus.
Losing sight of all but Thee.
Oh what joy Thy presence gives us,
Calling up our hearts to Thee!
v2: Loved with love which knows no measure.
Save the Father’s love to Thee.
Blessed Lord, our hearts would treasure.
All the Father’s thoughts of Thee.
v3: All His joy, His rest, His pleasure–
All His deep delight in Thee–
Lord, Thy heart alone can measure
What the Father found in Thee.
v4: How He set His love upon Thee–
Called Thee His beloved Son:
Yet for us He did not spare Thee,
By Thy death our life was won.
v5: O the joy, the wondrous singing.
When we see Thee as Thou art!
Thy blessed name. Lord Jesus, bringing
Sweetest music to God’s heart.
v6: Notes of gladness, songs unceasing,
Hymns of everlasting praise.
Psalms of glory, joy increasing.
Through God’s endless day of days.

v1: There is a candle in every soul,
Some brightly burning, some dark and cold,
There is a Spirit who brings a fire,
Ignites a candle and makes His home
c: Carry your candle, run to the darkness,
Seek out the hopeless, confused and torn,
And hold out your candle for all to see it,
Take your candle, go light your world
Take your candle, go light your world
v2: Frustrated brother, see how he's tried to,
Light his own candle some other way
See now your sister she's been robbed and lied to,
Still holds a candle without a flame
v3: We are a family whose hearts are blazing,
So let's raise our candles and light up the sky
Praying to our Father, "In the name of Jesus,
Make us a beacon in darkest times!"

Songs For Our Generation.title: God the Creator Became a God-man

v1: God the Creator became a God-man
His death redeemed us for His glorious plan.
Now in resurrection the Spirit’s released
Producing the church.
This is God’s masterpiece.
v2: Lord, You are my choice.
I have seen Your beauty.
I belong to You
Now and evermore.
You’re my only choice
Lord, You are so lovely.
Lord, I give all for Your masterpiece.
v3: Lord, I love You.
There is no other.
I’ll love You always.
Lord, I love You,
My heart is recovered.
Lord, I give all for Your masterpiece.
v4: Thank You. Lord Jesus, for capturing me.
Thank You, Lord, I now experience Thee.
By feasting! Enjoying!
Your Life would increase.
Thank You, Lord,
I’m part of God’s masterpiece.

Songs For Our Generation.title: God Wants Someone to Love Him

v1: God wants someone to love Him,
Not just someone to serve Him,
He wants someone to love Him
As His bride.
God wants someone to match Him,
Not just to imitate Him,
He wants a counterpart,
One from His side.
c: For this He came down to us:
He came to court to woo us,
Away from everything, and unto Him.
Now we’re espoused unto Him,
Pledged and betrothed unto Him,
Yes, we are bound unto Him, by His love.
v2: God wants someone to love Him,
Not just someone to fear Him,
He wants a sweetheart who will
Be His bride.
God wants someone to know Him,
Not just to know about Him:
He wants someone who’ll look Him
In the eye.

v1: He giveth more grace when the burdens grow greater,
He sendeth more strength when the labors increase,
To added affliction He addeth His mercy,
To multiplied trials, His multiplied peace.
c: His love has no limit, His grace has no measure,
His power no boundary known unto men,
For out of His infinite riches in Jesus,
He giveth and giveth and giveth again.
v2: When we have exhausted our store of endurance,
When our strength has failed ere the day is half-done,
When we reach the end of our hoarded resources,
Our Father's full giving is only begun.

v1: He is exalted
The King is exalted on high
And I will praise Him
He is exalted forever exalted
And I will praise His name
c: He is the Lord
Forever His truth shall reign
Heaven and earth, rejoice in His Holy name
He is exalted
The King is exalted on high

c1: I will praise You, O Lord my God
With all of my heart I will glorify Your name forever. (2x)
c2: Great is Your love to me, You have delivered me. (2x)
v1: Hear the passion of my prayer, O Lord,
All of my life I give to praise Your name.
Your forgiveness and Your mercy are the only way
That I can get to You to say…
v2: Just to know You is to be alive,
Your love has lifted me up from my grave.
You have rescued me from sin and I am here today
Just to come to You to say…

v1: Here I am O God
I bring this sacrifice
My open heart
I offer up my life
I look to You Lord
Your love that never ends
Restores me again
c: So, I lift my eyes to You Lord
In Your strength I will break through Lord
Touch me now, let Your grace fall down on me
I feel Your love dispel all my fears
Through the storm I will hold on Lord
And by faith I will walk on Lord
Then I’ll see beyond my calvary one day
And I will be complete in You

Songs For Our Generation.title: How Deep the Father’s Love for Us

v1: How deep the Father's love for us
How vast beyond all measure
That He should give His only Son
To make a wretch His treasure
How great the pain of searing loss
The Father turns His face away
As wounds which mar the Chosen One
Bring many sons to glory
v2: Behold the Man upon a cross
My sin upon His shoulders
Ashamed I hear my mocking voice
Call out among the scoffers
It was my sin that held Him there
Until it was accomplished
His dying breath has brought me life
I know that it is finished
v3: I will not boast in anything
No gifts no power no wisdom
But I will boast in Jesus Christ
His death and resurrection
Why should I gain from His reward
I cannot give an answer
But this I know with all my heart
His wounds have paid my ransom

v1: I am not skilled to understand
What God has willed what God has planned
I only know at His right hand
Stands One who is my Savior
v2: I take Him at His word and deed
Christ died to save me this I read
And in my heart I find a need
Of Him to be my Savior
p: That He would leave His place on high
And come for sinful man to die

Songs For Our Generation.title: I’m a Sinner Without One Plea

v1: I’m a sinner without one plea,

v2: Had I wealth and love in fullest measure,

I will boast in the One Who's worthy

b: I will make my boast in Christ alone

v1: Light of the world

Beauty that made
This heart adore You;

Altogether wonderful to me.
v2: King of all days

Humbly You came
To the earth You created,

v1: Lord Jesus, You are so beautiful

Lord, guide me every moment each day.
v2: And if my mind from my spirit part,
If doubts and fears should hold my heart
And control my thoughts;
Then, Lord, press faith into my heart,
Seal me and claim me as Your own;
By Your blood I’m bought.

v1: Lord, keep my heart always true to You,

A heart that is pure that sees only You,
A heart that loves You and treasures only You.
c: Your love constrains me to give my all to You.
Lord, I can’t help it my heart is drawn to You.
Oh what a privilege I give myself to You.
I love You Lord, dearest Lord
I love You, I just love You.
v2: Lord keep my love burning brightly for You,
A love never dwindling, always hot for You,
A love shining brighter all the way for You,
A love so fresh, like the day I first touched You.
v3: Lord, take my life, I present it to You!
If I had a thousand, I'd pour all on You!
Nothing withholding, my all is for You.
My life and my future, dear Lord, is all for You.
(Verses and Chorus can be sung simultaneously)

Songs For Our Generation.title: Lord You Love Me So Immensely

v1: Lord, You love me so immensely;

Ev’ry day and ev’ry moment, Lord, capture me.
Let my goal and my life’s theme be,
Lord, to love You more supremely;
With all my heart, Lord Jesus,
Keep me faithful unto Thee.
c: Draw me, Lord, each day; take my veils away.
With a pure heart will I see You,
Lord, I just love You.
Nothing else I seek; no one else for me.
I would fully and absolutely
Give my whole being unto Thee.
v2: Lord, Your love has overcome me.
Now my prayer is that I would be
Ever open just to see You.
Lord, grow in me.
Make my everlasting life be
In Your presence, Lord, etern’ly;
Fill me with Your life, Lord Jesus;
My pure enjoyment be.
v3: Lord, Your love has shown me the way
Lord, to gain more of You each day.
Every time I call on You, Lord,
You come to me.
And my spirit, full and gushing

Lord, flow through all my being;

Songs For Our Generation.title: Lord, I Lift Your Name on High

v1: Lord, I lift Your name on high
Lord, I love to sing Your praises
I'm so glad You’re in my life
I'm so glad You came to save us
c: You came from heaven to earth
To show the way
From the earth to the cross
My debt to pay
From the cross to the grave
From the grave to the sky
Lord, I lift Your name on high

v1: Lord the light of Your love is shining
In the midst of the darkness shining
Jesus Light of the world shine upon us
Set us free by the truth You now bring us

c: Shine Jesus shine, Fill this land
With the Father's glory, Blaze Spirit blaze
Set our hearts on fire, Flow river flow
Flood the nations, With grace and mercy
Send forth Your Word Lord, And let there be light
v2: Lord I come to Your awesome presence
From the shadows into Your radiance
By the blood I may enter Your brightness
Search me try me consume all my darkness
Shine on me shine on me
v3: As we gaze on Your kingly brightness
So our faces display Your likeness
Ever changing from glory to glory
Mirrored here may our lives tell Your story
Shine on me shine on me

v1: Lord, You take my heart away with Your love
And I am willing to put on my faith in Your plan
p: Come and take my life.
Make my soul refreshed in truth now
c: I am ready for You.
Take my heart and make me new now.
I am ready for You
To come and fill my soul.
v2: Cleanse all of my mind that is not of You.
Break me, teaching me how to find rest in Your hands
b: Whatever it takes,
I'm needing to make Your will be done
And I'm letting go of my control,
For I see what You've done in me.

v1: Love the Lord your God
With all your heart and all your soul
And all your mind
And love all mankind
As you have loved yourselves and…
v2: Love the Lord your God
With all your heart
And all your soul and mind
And love all mankind…
v3: We’ve got Christian lives to live
We’ve got Jesus’ love to give
We’ve got nothing to hide
Because in Him we all find
Love…
(All verses can be sung simultaneously)

Songs For Our Generation.title: To the Ends of the Earth

v1: Love unfailing
Overtaking my heart
You take me in
Finding peace again
Fear is lost in all You are
v2: And I would give the world to tell Your story
'Cause I know that You've called me
I know that You've called me
I've lost myself for good within Your promise
And I won't hide it, I won't hide it
c: Jesus I believe in You, and I would go
To the ends of the earth, to the ends of the earth
For You alone are the Son of God
And all the world will see
That You are God, that You are God

v1: Many weary years I vainly sought a spring
One that never would run dry;
Unavailing all that earth to me could bring,
Nothing seemed to satisfy.
c: Drinking at the Fountain that never runs dry,
Drinking at the Fountain of life am I;
Finding joy and pleasure, in abounding measure,
I am drinking at the Fountain of life.
v2: Through the desert land of sin I roam no more,
For I find a living Spring,
And my cup of gladness now is running o’er,
Jesus is my Lord and King.
v3: Here is sweet contentment as the days go by,
Here is holy peace and rest;
Here is consolation as the moments fly,
Here my heart is always blest.
v4: Here I find a never ending sure supply,
While the endless ages roll;
To this healing Fountain I would ever fly,
There to bathe my weary soul.

v1: Multiply Your love through us
To the lost and the least
Let us be Your healing hands
Your instruments of peace
May our single purpose be
To live out Your life
Through our simple words and deeds
Let Love be multiplied.
v2: Multiply Your love through me
To someone in need
Help me Lord to freely give
This grace that I’ve received
Let my single purpose be
To live out Your life
Through my simple words and deeds
Let Love be multiplied.
v3: Multiply Your Church through us
To the ends of the earth
Where there’s only barrenness
Let us see new birth
Use us as Your laborers
Working side by side
Let us see Your harvest come
Let Love be multiplied.

v1: My Jesus, my Savior, Lord there is none like You.
All of my days, I want to praise.
The wonders of Your mighty love.
My Comfort, my shelter, tower of refuge and strength,
Let every breath, all that I am, never cease to worship You.
c: Shout to the Lord all the earth let us sing
Power and majesty, praise to the King
Mountains bow down and the seas will roar
At the sound of Your name
I sing for joy at the work of Your hands
Forever I’ll love You, forever I’ll stand
Nothing compares to the promise I have in You.

v1: My Savior, Redeemer
Lifted me from the miry clay
Almighty, Forever
I will never be the same
p: 'Cause You came near
From the everlasting
To the world we live
The Father's only Son
c: You lived and You died
You rose again on high
You opened the way
For the world to live again
Hallelujah, for all You've done

v1: Nearer each day to me
Dearer each day to me,
This Person inside me is
Becoming reality.
Saving me, loving me
Faith and hope giving me,
You're all the world to me
Jesus my Lord.
v2: Even when faith is small
When there's no hope at all
I hear Him say to me
“Trust in Me and you'll see
That I'll supply all your needs
If only you will believe.
All anxious doubts will cease,
While trusting in Me.”

Songs For Our Generation.title: Never More This World Shall Bind Me

v1: Nevermore this world shall bind me
I won’t let it tie me up
Nor let it weigh me down
Although Pharaoh’s force surrounds me
I am free from fear and doubt
c: Here I am, standing on Mount Zion high
Far above the storms
Where I hear the heavenly Father’s cry
“Hear Him, this is My Beloved,
My Beloved for you He died!”
His Word, my strength, my stay, my life
I’ll live, I’ll die, I’ll fight
And on I’ll go
Wherever He goes
v2: More and more this living water
Gushes forth from deep within
And flows out to the end
There’s a table spread before me
All-inclusive Christ my land

v1: Nothing’s quite so precious
As Jesus in my spirit.
He takes away the care
And fills me with His peace.
He never leaves me,
E’en as the days grow weary.
His presence goes with me.
My soul delights to hide in His arms.
c: I call His name, “Lord Jesus,
Help me in my weakness.”
So faithfully each day in me
He proves His life is so sufficient
v2: Nothing’s quite so precious
As Jesus in my spirit.
He turns my heart to Him,
To feast upon His life.
It’s nothing I do—
His mercy’s just upon me.
And God’s free gift of grace
Becomes an endless joy to me.

v1: Now from my heart comes
A happy song
It’s just for You, Lord, there’s only One
Jesus, I love You.
c: How I love to sing with my spirit and heart to You
Jesus, You’re so rich in who You are and what You do
Every time I turn and open up, I drink of You,

v2: I’ve seen how they
Pierced Your side
You gave Your all, to win Your bride
J-E-S-U-S, I love You
v3: Without Your love, Lord
I’m so empty
Life has no meaning, just vanity
Jesus, reality
v4: Jesus in me
What a wonder
Bubbling over, living water
Jesus, what a joy!

Songs For Our Generation.title: O Love, That Will Not Let Me Go

v1: O Love, that wilt not let me go,

Songs For Our Generation.title: I Could Sing of Your Love Forever

Now in resurrection He
As the Spirit lives in me.

Just by calling, He comes in, Glory to God!
Once you call upon His name,
Nevermore you’ll be the same.
c2: We all (we all) must call on Him,
We give (we give) our all to Him.

v1: Recall how David swore,
“I’ll not come into my house,
Nor go up to my bed,
Give slumber to mine eyelids . . .
Until I find a place for Thee,

Our mighty God desires a Home
Where all His own may come.
v2: How blinded we have been,
Shut in with what concerns us;

We’ll go up to the mountain,

v3: O Lord, against these days,

v4: Within those whom You’d call

The gates of hell cannot prevail

Jesus most beloved shall be;
Beauteous more than all things beauteous,
He alone is joy to me.

Thou art loving, sweet, and tender,

Still Thou lovest, lovest ever,
Shall I not love Thee, my God?
v5: Keep my heart still faithful to Thee,
That my earthly life may be
But a shadow to that glory
Of my hidden life in Thee.

v1: Son of God shaper of the stars
You alone, dweller of my heart
Mighty King, how beautiful You are
How beautiful
Son of God the Father’s gift to us

c: Jesus, Oh Holy One
I sing to You, forgiven
Savior, I’m overcome
With Your great love for me
v2: Son of God strength beyond compare
You alone the darkness cannot bear
Lord of love, Your kindness draws me near
It draws me.
Son of God prophecy of old
You alone, redeemer of my soul
Come again and lead Your people home
Come lead us home
b: You are worthy, You are worthy
You are worthy of all my praise
You are beautiful, You are beautiful
And I will lift up my hands and sing

v1: Splendid church life! His green garden!

He is full of rich enjoyment
To His saints in one accord;

In the garden growing in His grace!
There is no finer pleasure
Than to eat the living Tree
And to get the living water into me.
v2: It is not a school or factory
Or a chapel in the air;

So He’s placed us all here corporately
To be His garden fair,

v3: Thus within the church life garden
There’s a fruit producing Tree
Full of life and so available to eat.
So be simple, don’t be hardened,
Drop your concepts – eat that Tree!
Take in Jesus every moment – He’s so sweet!

v1: The nails in Your hands
The nail in Your feet
They tell me how much You love me;
The thorns on Your brow
They tell me how
You bore so much pain to love me.
v2: And when the heavens pass away,
All Your scars will still remain,
And forever they will say
How much You love me.
v3: Forever my love,
Forever my heart,
Forever my life is Yours.

v1: The splendor of the King, clothed in majesty
Let all the earth rejoice, all the earth rejoice
He wraps Himself in light, and darkness tries to hide
And trembles at His voice, trembles at His voice
c: How great is our God, sing with me
How great is our God, and all will see
How great, how great is our God
v2: Age to age He stands, and time is in His hands
Beginning and the End, Beginning and the End
The Godhead, three in one; Father, Spirit, Son
The Lion and the Lamb, the Lion and the Lamb
b: Name above all names, worthy of all praise
My heart will sing, how great is our God

v1: There is no other Name
By which men can be saved

There is rest for my soul
And the wounded made whole

I’ve found in the grace that flowed to me

And this is why,
My heart and soul and tongue confess (Jesus!)

v1: There is none like You
No one else can touch
My heart like You do
I could search
For all eternity long and find
There is none like You
c: Your mercy flows like a river wide
And healing comes in Your Name
We are blessed in Your presence, O God
And there is none like You

Songs For Our Generation.title: There is Sunshine in My Soul Today

v1: There is sunshine in my soul today,
More glorious and bright
Than glows in any earthly sky,
For Jesus is my light.
c: O there’s sunshine, blessed sunshine,
While the peaceful, happy moments roll;
When Jesus shows His smiling face
There is sunshine in my soul.
v2: There is music in my soul today,
A carol to my King;
And Jesus, listening, can hear
The song I cannot sing.
v3: There is springtime in my soul today.
For when the Lord is near
The dove of peace sings in my heart,
The flowers of grace appear.
v4: There is gladness in my soul today,
And hope, and praise, and love,
For blessings which He gives me now,
For joys laid up above.

v1: These are the days of salvation.
Our past has been washed by His blood
And these are the days of redemption for you,
Sinners become sons of God.
And though you might feel you’re unworthy,
Still Jesus has called you by name.
Now we will proclaim to all nations ‘round us,
“Repent and believe in the Lord!”
c: Behold He comes, Christ our risen Lord.
Let the trumpets ring, Hosannas to the King.
Lift your voice, it’s the year of Jubilee.
In the name of Jesus Christ salvation comes!
v2: These are the days of rejoicing,
Lift up your praise to our King.
And these are the days of pressing forward,
As brothers and sisters we sing.
And these are the days of Your kingdom.
We stand and declare to the world,
That we are forever one in Spirit,
Declaring the Name of the Lord!

v1: There’s a life that’s deeper than our mind,

It’s of depth and height and breadth unsearchable.
Now this life is just the Living One
Manifested in the Person of the Son.
As the Spirit, He flows;
In our spirit He grows,
Growing up to be the church that He desires.
c: O Lord, we’re, just for Your flowing;
How we, need a deeper knowing.
Life is why we’re here
And why You’ve come in us.
Turn us Lord, turn us now;
Turn us deeply – Life is how
You will get the church,
The home You’re longing for.
v2: In the church, we all can apprehend
All the riches of this life that is within.
Not just shallowness with strife,
But a deep and peaceful life
Is just waiting to flow out, a living spring.
With the saints it’s easy to be bold,
To pursue this life, to gain it, to lay hold,
All the other things we find,
Must be quickly left behind,
So that only life remains for us to see.
v3: Deeper, Lord our turn must be to You;
We would move by life in everything we do:
All our concepts refute,
For Your life be absolute.
Grant us grace to turn much deeper day by day.
When we touch our spirit – such a thrill!
This is far beyond emotion, mind, and will.
It’s within our hidden part,
Come, make home in all our heart;
Let Your presence flow as rivers deep within.

v1: This is my desire
To honor You
Lord, with all my heart
I worship You
v2: All I have within me
I give You praise
All that I adore
Is in You
c: Lord, I give You my heart
I give You my soul
I live for You alone
Every breath that I take
Every moment I'm awake
Have Your way in me

Shall I not say, O Tide of love, flow in?

Life cannot be as it hath hither been.
v3: Break through my nature, mighty, heavenly love,
Clear every avenue of thought and brain,
Flood my affections, purify my will,

v4: Thus wholly mastered and possessed by God,
Forth from my life, spontaneous and free,

v1: Atoning sacrifice, keeper of this life
Hallelujah, You are Savior

c: Jesus, You are stronger, more than any other
Hallelujah, what a Savior
Jesus, You are higher, my soul’s deepest desire
Hallelujah, You are Savior
v2: You are the Shepherd King, You lead us by still waters
Hallelujah, You are Savior
You are my only hope, Your kindness is my friend
In Your presence You restore us
b: You are the way, the truth and the life
You are my joy and salvation
Stood in my place, taking my shame
Upon Your shoulders
